hero.subtitle: Tattoo & Art
hero.description: Professional tattooing in Zalaegerszeg. Every piece is unique and personalized – whether it's fineline, blackwork, or realism.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am Gábor Tóth, the creator and owner of TG Art Tattoo. I have been in the industry since 2018, but I only opened my own tattoo studio in Zalaegerszeg in 2023.

Initially, I tried to learn and practice while working, but over time it became unsustainable, and I started building my own business. Since then, I have been putting much more effort into always being better and improving continuously so that I can create quality tattoos for you every day. In the past few years, I have achieved several successes, but I never feel like I can stop; I am always looking for new goals and challenges.

Over the years, I have tried myself in several styles, but it was late that it really started to become clear what my direction is. I mostly move in the sketch and fineline line, within which I especially like to create in horror, animal, and plant-themed patterns, but I also like to spread my wings in the world of realism.

For me, my clients are the most important, and I want to provide them with the best, so I try to be up to par in several styles. I believe that every tattoo has meaning and a story, so I am indescribably grateful for every person who chooses me because without them, I wouldn't be where I am! For me, this whole thing is not just work but also passion!

services.title: Services
services.description: Every tattoo is a unique, personalized work of art that reflects the wearer's personality and story. My services include the following:

tattooing.title: Tattooing
tattooing.description: Custom, personalized tattoos created in a professional environment. I work in sketch, fineline, blackwork, and realism styles — every piece is a unique work of art.

customDesign.title: Custom Design
customDesign.description: I create unique, personalized designs that reflect the client's personality and taste.

logoDesign.title: Logo / Graphics Design
logoDesign.description: I design custom logos and graphics tailored to the client's needs and style.

cdCoverDesign.title: CD Cover Design
cdCoverDesign.description: I design custom CD covers that reflect the artist's or company's style.

digitalDrawing.title: Digital Drawing Design
digitalDrawing.description: I create custom digital drawings tailored to the client's needs and style.

galleryPreview.title: Gallery
galleryPreview.description: A glimpse of my work – every tattoo tells a unique story.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: What my clients say about me – their satisfaction is the greatest recognition.

1.text: I wholeheartedly recommend Gábor to everyone. I wish everyone could have a first tattoo experience like this. The atmosphere was great, very pleasant and tasteful environment. Helpful and friendly. I don't regret choosing him for a second, and I'll definitely go to him for my future tattoos too.

2.text: The tattoo artist is very talented and creative. I have 2 tattoos from him so far and both are perfect, meticulous work. He is also very fair, cool, and patient. I can't wait to get another tattoo from him!

3.text: I'm very satisfied. He's approachable and friendly, so the sessions always pass in a good mood. He's precise and pays attention to every little detail, which shows in the finished tattoo. I wholeheartedly recommend him to everyone who wants quality work!

cta.title: Ready for your unique tattoo?
cta.description: Get in touch with me and let's discuss your ideas. Every tattoo is a collaboration – I look forward to hearing from you!

contactInfo.infoDescription: Frequently asked questions – everything you need to know before your tattoo.
contactInfo.contactDescription: Reach out and let's discuss your ideas!

0.q: How can I book an appointment?
0.a: You can book an appointment via Instagram, Facebook, or email. Describe your ideas, desired size, body part, and send reference images if you have any. We'll then discuss the details and available dates.

1.q: How much does a tattoo cost?
1.a: The price is always individual, depending on the size, detail level, difficulty of the body part, and the time required. You'll receive a quote during our consultation after discussing your ideas.

2.q: Do I need to pay a deposit?
2.a: Yes, I require a deposit when booking the appointment, which is deducted from the final price. This secures your appointment and covers the design work.

3.q: How should I prepare for the tattoo?
3.a: Get a good night's sleep, eat well before the session, and drink plenty of water. Avoid alcohol and blood thinners for at least 24 hours beforehand. Wear comfortable clothing that provides easy access to the area being tattooed.

4.q: How does the initial consultation work?
4.a: During the first consultation, we discuss your ideas, desired style, size, and body placement. We review reference images and develop the final concept together. I send the design for approval before the appointment.

5.q: What styles do you work in?
5.a: I primarily work in sketch and fineline styles, but I also take on blackwork, minimal, and realistic pieces. Check out my gallery to see my work, and if you're unsure, don't hesitate to reach out – we'll figure it out together!

6.q: How painful is getting a tattoo?
6.a: Pain levels vary from person to person and by body part. Bony areas with thin skin (ankle, ribs, wrist) tend to be more sensitive, while muscular, fleshy areas (upper arm, thigh) are less painful. Most of my clients tolerate the process well.

7.q: How should I care for a fresh tattoo?
7.a: I provide detailed aftercare instructions after the session. In general: keep it clean, apply the recommended cream, and avoid sun exposure, swimming, and sweating for the first 2-3 weeks. Don't scratch or peel the healing skin.

8.q: What is the minimum age for getting a tattoo?
8.a: For clients under 18, I require a parental consent form which can be downloaded from the Documents tab. There are no age restrictions for clients 18 and older.

9.q: Can you fix or rework an existing tattoo?
9.a: Yes, I do cover-up work and refreshing of existing tattoos. Send me a photo of your current tattoo so I can assess the possibilities and provide a quote.
